# pii_govid_us corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === United States ===
# SSN is structurally gated (Block 6f): area not 000/666/900-999,
# group not 00, serial not 0000.
# expect: Social Security Number
123-45-6789
# expect: US ITIN
912-78-1234
# expect: US EIN (labeled)
EIN: 12-3456789
# expect: US PTIN
P12345678
# expect: US Medicare MBI
1EG4TE5MK73
# expect: US DEA Number
AB1234563

# === Canada ===
# expect: Canada SIN (labeled)
SIN: 046-454-286
# expect: Canada Quebec RAMQ
DOEJ12345678
# expect: Canada Ontario OHIP
1234-567-890-AB
# expect: Canadian Passport
AB123456

# === Mexico ===
# expect: Mexico CURP
HEGG560427MVZRRL04
# expect: Mexico RFC
ABCD800101XYZ

# === US Driver's License distinctive formats (Block 4b) ===
# expect: US Driver's License (distinctive state format)
F123456789012
A12345678901234
12ABC34567
ABC123456
